body: Re-uploaded the correct Chapter 3 demo clip to Vimeo. Updated the embed ID in the Contentful entry. Testing now.
Tested on iPhone and desktop Chrome - embed loads correctly. Closing.
Heel raise progressions written in Contentful - 3 levels: seated towel scrunch, standing heel raise, single-leg heel raise. Sarah Mitchell reviewed for clinical accuracy.
Demo clip filmed and uploaded to Vimeo. PR open - chapter live after merge.
Reproduced in Chrome DevTools iPhone SE emulator. The nav z-index is 100, page heading is 200. Fix is a media query at max-width: 390px setting nav z-index to 300.
PR is up. Can you take a quick look at the media query logic? I'm not 100% sure if I should be using max-width or max-device-width.
Use max-width not max-device-width - the device-width one is deprecated. Your approach looks correct. Will merge after you test on an actual phone if you can.
This is the most requested thing in the signup feedback. Starting with Chapter 2 tummy time. Using wkhtmltopdf to generate PDF from HTML template.
Opened Algolia support ticket. They said I need to configure queryLanguages and enable typo tolerance on the index settings. Will try that Thursday.
Draft PR up with Algolia facet config. The 0-6mo and 6-12mo buckets are working. Still testing the 1-2yr range edge cases.
Looks reasonable. Make sure you test with a kid who is exactly 12 months - edge cases on month boundaries tend to catch people off guard.
Tyler set up a Contentful webhook that pings the Algolia re-index endpoint on every publish event. Should fix stale search results.
Tested by publishing a small edit to a Chapter 1 exercise. Search results updated within 30 seconds. Closing.
Currently getting about 3-4 bot signups per week. They leave the email field blank and populate a visible field. Honeypot should catch most of them.
Belly crawl prep write-ups complete - 3 progressions: prone prop on forearms, pivot prone, forward belly crawl initiation. Sarah reviewed clinical language.
All img tags on Chapter 3-6 pages now have loading=lazy. GTmetrix shows 1.2s improvement on mobile 4G simulation.
Added 301 redirect from /chapter-5-exercises to /exercises/chapter-5 in the nginx config. Old bookmarked URLs now redirect correctly.
Balance board progressions triaged for next available sprint. Need to film the demo clip - will ask Derek to hold the camera on a Saturday.
Set Vimeo embed to muted and playsinline. No more surprise audio on iOS. Also added a play button overlay so it doesn't autoplay at all.
Submit button now disables on click with a spinner SVG. Confirmed the IntegrityError duplicate signups in Sentry dropped to zero after this fix.
